sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Ownership group of NBA champion Boston Celtics is putting team up for sale
feed.summary: BOSTON ( AP ) - The ownership group that controls the reigning NBA champion Boston Celtics says it intends to sell all its shares of the team.
